info.title: Eng. Fernando De Los Santos Malpica
languages: English - B1 (technical reading and written communication)

profile: Mechatronics Engineer with hands-on experience in electronics, technical support, infrastructure, and physical security systems. Comfortable working across hardware, networks, and operational environments - from diagnosing equipment failures to coordinating technology projects in real business contexts. Currently expanding into web development independently, applying the same practical mindset to building functional backend systems and custom solutions.

experience.description: Career progression within the technical area of a self-service laundry chain, starting in electronic repair and evolving into a leadership role covering support, systems, infrastructure, and technology project coordination across branches and related companies.
responsibilities: Provided technical support for users and self-service laundry branches.
Diagnosed and resolved issues involving equipment, networks, CCTV, sensors, access control systems, and remote connections.
Installed and maintained CCTV systems, access control, alarms, structured cabling, and basic network/server infrastructure.
Repaired electronic boards for washing and drying equipment.
Coordinated technical activities, followed up on infrastructure projects, and proposed solutions for operational needs.
experience.achievements: Supported 38 self-service laundry branches. Coordinated technology infrastructure for the opening of a new branch in under 3 months. Repaired over 60 electronic boards and recovered more than 20 previously considered scrap. Identified and corrected recurring failures caused by poor installations and lack of maintenance.

experience.description: University-based initiative at FIME (UANL) focused on 3D modeling, virtual experiences, and multimedia production for institutional and external projects.
responsibilities: Trained students in Blender and multimedia tools.
Participated in internal and external UANL projects.
experience.achievements: Modeled and textured over 100 assets used in promotional images, virtual tours, and interactive experiences.

responsibilities: Diagnosed and repaired Apple devices and computer equipment.
Provided customer service and case follow-up.
experience.achievements: Repaired over 25 devices while keeping warranty returns below 10%.

responsibilities: Provided remote support in English for small and medium-sized businesses.
Handled incidents related to internet, phone, television, and billing services.

education.university: UANL | Universidad Autónoma de Nuevo León
education.faculty: FIME | Facultad de Ingeniería Mecánica y Eléctrica
education.title: Mechatronics Engineering
education.description: Graduate. All coursework completed. Degree certification in progress.
